texto: It never ceases to amaze me how prosaic, pedestrian, unimaginative people can persistently pontificate about classical grammatical structure as though it's fucking rocket science. These must be the same people who hate Picasso, because he couldn't keep the paint inside the lines and the colors never matched the numbers.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Abbe Diaz sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “It never ceases to amaze me how prosaic, pedestrian, unimaginative people can persistently pontif…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, grammar, structure, útil em momentos de structure e writing.
